challenge.title: Routing Basics Challenge
challenge.description: This challenge tests your understanding of static routes, routing tables, and multi-subnet connectivity.
instructions: 1. Configure static routes between the given subnets.
2. Explain how the routing table is constructed with the new static routes.
3. Test connectivity between devices in different subnets.
expected_outputs: 1. Proper routing table entries for static routes.
2. Successful ping results between devices in Subnet A and Subnet B.
3. Explanations of how static routes affect network traffic.
